productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Black Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt from united colors of benetton is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Length Freesize Made of 100% polyester twill tape with black and brown stripes Metallic casing on the tail of the belt and stylish press clasp to hold the belt in place Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand name on the buckle Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine
